titleStmt.title: SII 22.436: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 436. (A.R. No. 436 of 1906) COIMBATORE DISTRICT, GOPICHETTIPALAIYAM TALUK, DAṆĀYAKAṈKŌṬṬAI. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE IN THE FORT—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE

summary.p: This is dated in Śaka 1270 (mistake for 1271), Virōdhi, Vaigāśi 1, śu. 8 Sunday, Makhā corresponding to A.D. 1349, April 26, f.d.n. ·29.

It is mutilated and slightly built in. It records an order of the temple authorities of God Tāntōṉṟīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Tuṟavalūr alias Nīlagiri-sādāraṇaṉkōṭṭai in Oḍuvaṅgā-nāḍu, a division of Koṅgu-Maṇḍalam, conferring the hereditary post of temple architect on a certain Śōṇai-Āḻvār Sthapathi Aḻagiyanāyanār along with the privileges and perquisites attached thereto.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cūḻvai
ṭicaṉ karuma mārāyka pa
ṇṭe Aṟam ceytāṉ ceytāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pā
tam tiṟampāmal ceṉṉimel vaittu Aruḷāl Āti caṇṭecuraṉ
Ātecam . śakābdam Āyira[*t]tirunūṟṟu Eḻupatiṉmel cellā
niṉṟa viroti samvaṟsarattu vaikāci mātam mutal tiyati pūrva
pakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ vaṭaka
rai Irā nāṭṭu Ukaḷūrkūṟṟattu poṉ ṉṟattu
kāṇi Uṭaiya cirppācārimāril viśvāmitragotrattu coṇaiāḻvā rāṉa stapatiyarāya
Aḻakiyanāyiṉārkku koṅku maṇṭalattu Oṭuvaṅkānāṭṭu tuṟa
valūrāṉa nilakari catāraṇaṉkoṭṭaiyil Uṭaiyār tān
toṉṟīcuramuṭaiyār koyilil Ācāriyak kāṇi Āṭci Iva
nām Utakadhārāpūrvamākak kuṭukkaiyil Iṉnāyaṉār koyilil tirup
paṇikkuḷ ṉṟu maṟṟum Ācāriyap peṟuḷḷavaiyum peṟa
kkaṭavā Ivar makkaḷ makkaḷ cantiṟātittavaraiyumā
ka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷḷak kuṭuttom Aruḷi
cceyalpaṭikku Aruḷāl Āticaṇṭecura cikaraṇattāṉ Eḻuttu
tirumukappaṭikku Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇaril vā
cciyagotrattu Appāṇṭār Uyyakkoṇṭa nampi Eḻuttu
tagotrattu Aviṉāciyappaṉ tirumālaiyār kaimāṭṭā
maikku Aviṉāciappaṉ Eḻuttu 2 Ikkoyil pūjikku ṉampi
�r mutaliyar Eḻuttu 2 sośivar tāṉtoṉṟiśvaramuṭai
�r Eḻuttu 2 māṭāpattiyam Aṇṇāmalaiyar Eḻuttu 2 koyil
kaṇakku pāḷaṅkuṭaiyār vetavaṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu 2
Digital edition of SII 22.436 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
